channel.title: Authors on Mayco Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Authors on Mayco Blog

item.title: Mayco S. Berghetti
item.description: Assuntos de interesse são sistemas operacionais, redes e programação.<\br> Trabalhos publicados<\br> # IFIP Networking 2026 <\br> [Synergy: A Fast and Scalable Feedback-Driven Scheduler for Datacenter Applications](https://dl.ifip.org/db/conf/networking/networking2026/1571259812.pdf)
